InstructionData.Title: Ice Melting Furnace
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
Init: alias Furnace d0 #alias Input d1 #alias COPump d2 #alias COSwitch d3
alias Temp r1 alias Psi r2 alias Load r3
Loop1: l Psi Furnace Pressure l Temp Furnace Temperature ls Load Furnace 0 Quantity bgt Load 0 CHECKPRES j Loop1
CHECKPRES: blt Psi 10000 CHECKTEMP #check furnace pressure j Loop1
CHECKTEMP: blt Temp 500 SENDACT #check furnace temperature j Loop1
SENDACT: s Furnace Activate 1 yield s Furnace Activate 0 j Loop1 Mel
